---
title: "Women phenotypes"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "")
print(getwd())
```

# Directories

```{r Defining directories, messages = FALSE}
# Folders
rm(list = ls())
sample_with_n_markers = 8
marker_in_n_samples = 1
prevalence_cutoff = 0.05
avg_abundance_cutoff = 0.05
remove_rare = TRUE
unclassified_threshold = 80

metadata_dir <- "../../Data/Metadata/fertility_meta_with_new_infer_causes_double_causes.csv"
feat_table_dir <- "../../Data/GTDB_sensitive/"
stat_path = paste0("../../Results/strainphlan/ngd_plots_sample_with_n_markers_", sample_with_n_markers, "_marker_in_n_samples_", marker_in_n_samples)
res_files = list("wilcoxon_ngd_all_n_4")

file = "phenotype_individuals"
save_dir = paste0(stat_path, "/")
if (!file.exists(save_dir)){
  dir.create(save_dir)
}
```
 
# Libraries

```{r Loading libraries, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(stringr)  
library(data.table)
library(purrr)
library(rstatix)
library(colorRamp2)
library(extrafont)
library(showtext)
font_add_google("Gafata")
showtext_auto()
library(chisq.posthoc.test)
library(vegan)

options(scipen = 999)
source('packages/raw_data_analysis_utils.R')
source('packages/data_manipulations.R')
source('packages/metaphlan_functions.R')
source('packages/load_data.R')
```

# Load data

## Statistical results

```{r, message = FALSE}
cat_lst = list()
for (file in res_files){
  category_file = paste0(stat_path, "/", file, ".csv")
  cat = read.csv(category_file) %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      mutate(category = ifelse(fdr <= 0.05, "shared", "not_shared")) %>%
      dplyr::select(c(species, sgb, category)) %>%
      mutate(sgb = str_replace(sgb, "t__", ""))
  cat_lst[[file]] = cat
}
```

## Load meta and taxonomy

```{r}
meta = order_meta(metadata_dir, feat_table_dir, "valencia_metaphlan_res", FALSE)

metaphlan <- read_tsv2(file.path(feat_table_dir, "../GTDB_sensitive/metaphlan4_taxonomy_METAPHLAN4.tsv"), cmnt = "#")

t_metaphlan <- reorganize_metaphlan_table(metaphlan, 't')
t_metaphlan_lst <- sep_one_organ_metaphlan(t_metaphlan, rem = TRUE, remove_rare = FALSE, prevalence_cutoff = prevalence_cutoff, avg_abundance_cutoff = avg_abundance_cutoff, remove_unclassified_column = TRUE, unclassified_threshold = unclassified_threshold)

# Order features tables and metadata (same samples and normalize)
orig_meta = meta
common = Reduce(intersect, list(t_metaphlan_lst$vaginal$sample_id, t_metaphlan_lst$rectal$sample_id, meta$sample_id))
print(length(common))
meta = meta %>% filter(sample_id %in% common)
```

## Load ngd long files

```{r, message=FALSE}
n = 2
ngd_all = read_csv(file = paste0(stat_path, "/ngd_all_df_with_n_1.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
ngd_all = ngd_all %>% group_by(sgb) %>%
                filter(sum(same_person == TRUE) >= n) %>%
                ungroup() %>%
                select(-c("...1")) %>%
                mutate(sgb = str_replace(sgb, "t__", ""))
print(length(unique(ngd_all$sgb)))
```

# Add shared/not_shared for samples

```{r}
meta_cols_to_check = c("patient_age", "BMI", "weight", "partner_age", 
                       "E2_on_hCG", "Prog_on_hCG", "LH", "FSH", "G", "P", "total_GT_dose",
                       "vaginal_total_reads_after_bowtie", "rectal_total_reads_after_bowtie", 
                       "veg", "vegan", "probiotics", "antibiotics_in_the_past_3_months", "smoke",
                       "CST", "lacto_bin")

meta_lst = list()
for (name in names(cat_lst)){
  cat = cat_lst[[name]]
  species_sig_shared = cat %>% select(c(sgb, category))
  meta_with_sig_df = ngd_all %>%
              left_join(species_sig_shared, by = "sgb") %>%
              mutate(category = ifelse(is.na(category), "not_shared", category)) %>%
              group_by(sample_id_1) %>%
              summarize(sig_count = sum(category == "shared" & sample_id_1 == sample_id_2)) %>% arrange(-sig_count) %>%
              mutate(sig_bin = ifelse(sig_count >= 1, 1, 0)) %>%
              left_join(meta %>% select(all_of(c("sample_id", meta_cols_to_check))), by = c("sample_id_1" = "sample_id"))
  meta_lst[[name]] = meta_with_sig_df
}
```

# Function

```{r}
get_samples_with_sig_traits = function(df = samples_with_sig_df, col_1 = "sig_bin", col_2){
  col_2_features_num = df %>% select(all_of(col_2)) %>% filter(!is.na(!!as.name(col_2))) %>% n_distinct()
  df = df %>% select(all_of(c(col_1, col_2))) %>%
          filter(!is.na(!!as.name(col_2)))
  if (is.factor(df[[col_2]]) | is.character(df[[col_2]])){
    if (col_2_features_num == 2){
      df = df %>% mutate(across(everything(), ~ factor(., levels = c(1, 0))))
    }
    freq_both_df = table(df %>% pull(col_1), df %>% pull(col_2))
    test = fisher.test(freq_both_df)
    res = data.frame(col = col_2, odds_ratio = 0,# as.numeric(test$estimate), 
                     p = as.numeric(test$p.value), test = "fishers")
  } else if (col_2_features_num > 2){
    col_2_0_values = df %>% filter(!!as.name(col_1) == 0) %>% pull(col_2)
    col_2_1_values = df %>% filter(!!as.name(col_1) == 1) %>% pull(col_2)
    normality0 = shapiro.test(col_2_0_values)
    normality1 = shapiro.test(col_2_1_values)
    if (normality0$p.value <= 0.05 | normality1$p.value <= 0.05){
      test = wilcox.test(col_2_0_values, col_2_1_values, alternative = "two.sided")
      res = data.frame(col = col_2, odds_ratio = as.numeric(test$statistic), p = as.numeric(test$p.value), test = "wilcoxon")
    } else {
      test = t.test(col_2_0_values, col_2_1_values, data = df, alternative = "two.sided")
      res = data.frame(col = col_2, odds_ratio = as.numeric(test$statistic), p = as.numeric(test$p.value), test = "t.test")
    }
  }
  return(res)
}
```

# Test

```{r}
meta_stats_res_lst = list()

for (name in names(meta_lst)){
  print(name)
  samples_with_sig_df = meta_lst[[name]]
  samples_res = data.frame()
  for (col in meta_cols_to_check){
    curr_res = get_samples_with_sig_traits(samples_with_sig_df, "sig_bin", col)
    samples_res = bind_rows(samples_res, curr_res)
  }
  samples_res = samples_res %>% arrange(p) %>%
              mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p, "fdr")) %>%
              mutate(p = round(p, 4), fdr = round(fdr, 4))
  message(paste0(name, " had ", samples_res %>% filter(fdr <= 0.1) %>% nrow(), " significant comparisons"))
  message(paste0("Significant columns are: ", paste0(samples_res %>% filter(fdr <= 0.1) %>% pull(col), collapse = ", ")))
  meta_stats_res_lst[[name]] = samples_res
  save_name = sub("^[^_]*_", "", name)
  write_csv(samples_res, file = paste0(stat_path, "/meta_sig_", save_name, ".csv"), quote = "none")
}
```

## Post hoc test

```{r}
name = "wilcoxon_ngd_all_n_4"
sig_meta_cols = meta_stats_res_lst[[name]] %>%
            filter(fdr <= 0.1 & test == "fishers") %>% pull(col)
post_hoc_df = meta_lst[[name]] %>%
            select(c("sample_id_1", sig_meta_cols, "sig_bin")) %>%
            # select(-c(smoke)) %>%
            mutate(CST = factor(CST)) %>%
            filter(!is.na(CST))
xtab <- table(post_hoc_df$sig_bin, post_hoc_df$CST)
pairwise_fisher_test(xtab, p.adjust.method = "fdr") %>%
        arrange(p.adj)
```

# Plot

```{r}
get_group_fishers = function(df, curr_col, samples_res){
  p_val = samples_res %>% 
    filter(col == curr_col) %>% 
    pull(fdr)
  df = df %>% 
    select(c(sig_bin, !!as.name(curr_col))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(!!as.name(curr_col))) %>%
    mutate(sig_bin = factor(sig_bin, levels = c(0, 1)))
  plot = ggplot(df, aes_string(x = "sig_bin", fill = curr_col)) +
     geom_bar(position = "fill") +
     geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)),
            position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5), color = "white", size = 12, family = "Gafata") +
     # geom_signif(comparisons = list(c(0, 1)), annotations = p_val, y_position  = 1.01)+# ,xmin="IM", xmax="REF") +
     scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Women without\nshared events", "Women with\nshared events")) +
     labs(y = "Proportion", x = "", title = paste0("FDR = ", p_val)) +
     theme_bw(base_family = "Gafata") +
     theme(text = element_text(size = 35)) +
     theme(legend.text = element_text(size=30)) +
     theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30, lineheight = 0.5)) +
     theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  return(plot)
}

get_wilcox_plot = function(df, curr_col, title){
  plot = ggplot(data = plot_df, aes_string(x = "sig_bin", y = curr_col)) +
            geom_boxplot(aes_string(fill = "sig_bin"), outlier.shape = NA) +
            geom_point(color = 'black', shape = 19, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.3, position = position_jitter(width = 0.2)) +
            theme_bw(base_family = "Gafata") +
            scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "#264653", "1" = "#E76F51"), name = "") +
            scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Women without\nshared events", "Women with\nshared event")) +
            ylab(str_replace_all(curr_col, "_", " ")) +
            xlab("") +
            # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5)) +
            theme(legend.position = "none") +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 40))
    return(plot)
}
```

### Save sig results

```{r}
library(patchwork)
cst_plot = get_group_fishers(samples_with_sig_df, "CST", samples_res) +
            scale_fill_manual(values = cst_colors, name = "CST") 
# ggsave(filename = paste0(save_dir, "cst_proportions.png"), plot = cst_plot, height = 3, width = 5, dpi = 300)

smoke_plot = get_group_fishers(samples_with_sig_df, "smoke", samples_res) +
            scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "#264653", "1" = "#E76F51"), name = "",
                              labels = c("Non-smoker", "Smoker")) 
# ggsave(filename = paste0(save_dir, "smoke_proportions.png"), plot = smoke_plot, height = 3, width = 5, dpi = 300)

both = (cst_plot | smoke_plot) +
              plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') & 
              theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 50))
ggsave(plot = both, filename = paste0(stat_path, "/meta_sig_patched_plot_4.png"), width = 8, height = 5.2, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
library(rstatix)
pair_df = samples_with_sig_df %>% 
  filter(!is.na(CST)) %>%
  mutate(sig_bin = factor(sig_bin, levels = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(CST = factor(CST))
xtab <- table(pair_df$sig_bin, pair_df$CST)
pairwise_fisher_test(xtab, p.adjust.method = "fdr") %>%
        arrange(p.adj)
rstatix::pairwise_fisher_test(data = pair_df, formula = sig_bin ~ CST)
```

```{r}
plots_lst = list()
for (curr_col in meta_cols_to_check){
  stat_method = samples_res %>% filter(col == curr_col) %>% pull(test)
  if (samples_res %>% filter(col == curr_col) %>% pull(fdr) <= 0.05){
    if (stat_method == "wilcoxon"){
    plot_df = samples_with_sig_df %>% 
                mutate(sig_bin = factor(sig_bin)) %>% 
                filter(!is.na(!!as.name(curr_col)))
    plot = get_wilcox_plot(plot_df, curr_col)
    plots_lst[[curr_col]] = plot
    ggsave(plot, filename = paste0(save_dir, curr_col, ".png"), height = 4.5, width = 5, dpi = 300)
    }
  }
}
```
